meaning: n.(无线电台上)唱片的播送
examples: Our first single got a lot of airplay.
The band is starting to get a lot of airplay.
Airplay could become a standard if it is broadly and cheaply licensed.
They can even do that competing on a big-screen TV, thanks to AirPlay Mirroring.
You guessed it, this system is focused as an AirPlay speaker, first and foremost.
